en: You know, that's a kneeler. Oh.
Tell me your sins, my son. Uh, well, I should mention that I'm Jewish.
Well, that's no sin. Oh, good.
Anyway, I wanted to talk to you about Dr. Watley.
ko: 어쨌든, 나는 너와 왓리 박사에 대해 이야기하고 싶었어.

en: I have a suspicion that he's converted to Judaism purely for the jokes.
ko: 그는 농담을 위해서만 유대교로 개종한 것 같아.

en: And this offends you as a Jewish person?
No, it offends me as a comedian.
And it'll interest you to know that he's also telling Catholic jokes.
ko: 그리고 그가 가톨릭 농담도 하고 있다는 걸 알면 흥미로울 거야.
